CLI middleware declaration and reference rules.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

//fabrik:cli:middleware name=confirm
func Confirm(next cli.Handler) cli.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:cli:middleware name=confirm
func ConfirmAgain(next cli.Handler) cli.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:cli:middleware name=wrong
func Wrong(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:middleware name=unexported
func hidden(next cli.Handler) cli.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:cli:middleware name=Bad
func BadToken(next cli.Handler) cli.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:cli:middleware name=generic
func Generic[T any](next cli.Handler) cli.Handler { return next }

-- want/diags --
error: shared/shared.go:8:1: duplicate //fabrik:cli:middleware name "confirm"
  help: first declared at $WORK/shared/shared.go:5:1
error: shared/shared.go:11:1: middleware Wrong has the wrong signature
  help: want func(next cli.Handler) cli.Handler
error: shared/shared.go:14:1: //fabrik:cli:middleware function hidden must be exported
  help: generated code calls it as a package-qualified symbol; capitalize the name
error: shared/shared.go:17:30: invalid CLI token "Bad"
  help: names are lowercase kebab-case: [a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*
error: shared/shared.go:20:1: //fabrik:cli:middleware function Generic cannot be generic
  help: generated code cannot instantiate type parameters; declare a concrete function
